pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh which target the 'ga' user's Documents folder.
Task description explicitly specifies 'exactly three headers: Name,Department,Total'.
setup_task.sh injects exactly 5 synthetic expense report emails into the Thunderbird Inbox.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a CSV file at '/home/ga/Documents/expense_summary.csv' with the headers 'Name', 'Department', and 'Total'. The environment is set up with 5 synthetic expense report emails injected into the Thunderbird Inbox, corresponding to the 5 expected data rows.
